codeList:
pulsarv3:
  enabled: false
externalKafka:
  enabled: true
  brokerList: <your_kafka_address>:<your_kafka_port>
  securityProtocol: SASL_SSL
  sasl:
    mechanisms: PLAIN
    username: ""
    password: ""
helm install my-release zilliztech/milvus -f values.yaml
helm uninstall my-release
apiVersion: milvus.io/v1alpha1
kind: Milvus
metadata:
  name: my-release
  labels:
    app: milvus
spec:
  config:
    kafka:
      # securityProtocol supports: PLAINTEXT, SSL, SASL_PLAINTEXT, SASL_SSL
      securityProtocol: PLAINTEXT
      # saslMechanisms supports: PLAIN, SCRAM-SHA-256, SCRAM-SHA-512
      saslMechanisms: PLAIN
      saslUsername: ""
      saslPassword: ""
  dependencies:
    msgStreamType: "kafka"
    kafka:
      external: true
      brokerList:
        - "kafkaBrokerAddr1:9092"
        - "kafkaBrokerAddr2:9092"
apiVersion: milvus.io/v1alpha1
kind: Milvus
metadata:
  name: my-release
  labels:
    app: milvus
spec:
  dependencies:
    msgStreamType: "kafka"
    kafka:
      inCluster:
        values: {}  # see https://artifacthub.io/packages/helm/bitnami/kafka
  components: {}
  config: {}
kubectl apply -f milvuscluster.yaml
kubectl delete milvus my-release
headingContent: Use Kafka as the Milvus Message Queue

anchorList.label: Helm을 사용하여 Kafka와 함께 Milvus 클러스터 배포하기
Milvus Operator를 사용하여 Kafka와 함께 Milvus 클러스터 배포
